terms.name: Context Runtime
terms.definition: Permission-aware understanding of present operational situation

terms.name: Active Context
terms.definition: Primary and secondary context stack for current work

terms.name: Context Signal
terms.definition: Short-lived observation from approved source

terms.name: Context Resolution
terms.definition: Ranking and conflict detection across signals

terms.name: Human Declared
terms.definition: Context explicitly selected by Human overrides inference

terms.name: Institution Isolation
terms.definition: Context scoped and refreshed on institution switch

terms.name: Mission Context
terms.definition: Work linked to mission, objective, and decision authority

terms.name: Calendar Context
terms.definition: Temporal awareness before, during, and after events

terms.name: Meeting Context
terms.definition: Agenda and decisions without unauthorized recording

terms.name: Location Context
terms.definition: Optional purpose-limited place awareness

terms.name: Travel Context
terms.definition: Advisory travel estimates without continuous tracking

terms.name: Device Context
terms.definition: Presentation adaptation with shared-device safeguards

terms.name: Attention Intelligence
terms.definition: Explainable priority without fake urgency

terms.name: Focus Session
terms.definition: Protected work period with interruption policy

terms.name: Quiet Time
terms.definition: Human-defined periods suppressing ordinary interruptions

terms.name: Next Action
terms.definition: Contextual dismissible recommendation that does not mutate records

terms.name: Context Correction
terms.definition: Human feedback improving future resolution

terms.name: Inference Pause
terms.definition: Human control to pause context inference

terms.name: Context Retention
terms.definition: Expiration of stale signals and context

terms.name: Situational Awareness
terms.definition: Understanding enough to be useful without surveillance
